title: Evangelion 333 German DVD and Blu ray released
display_title: Evangelion 333 German DVD and Blu ray released
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.33 - German DVD and Blu-ray released!             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Apr 12, 2013 3:54 am [s]Same as before with 1.01/1.11 and 2.22, which got a german dub/release kinda fast, Evangelion 3.33 will probably be released in october 2013. Source: http://www.bluray-disc.de/blu-ray-filme/evangelion-333-you-can-not-redo-blu-ray-disc[/s] Evangelion 3.33 will be released november 29th 2013 in germany on dvd (in a steelbook) and blu-ray. Pre-order is available now. http://www.amazon.de/Evangelion-3-33-You-redo-Steelbook/dp/B00EZCVFKS/ref=sr_1_8?ie=UTF8&qid=1379053917&sr=8-8&keywords=evangelion+3.33 http://www.amazon.de/Evangelion-3-33-Blu-ray-Special-Edition/dp/B00EZCVFGC/ref=sr_1_10?ie=UTF8&qid=1379053917&sr=8-10&keywords=evangelion+3.33 Update: release moved to december 13th + official packshot

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Apr 12, 2013 10:52 am Love it, love everything about it. Hopefully the Cover is more beautiful than those for 1.11 and 2.22 this time.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Apr 12, 2013 11:18 am .....................Still waiting for never-gonna-happen Finnish releases of rebuilt series.............................

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 11:34 am Please tell me that cover is just a Place Holder, that looks awful.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 12, 2013 12:00 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Please tell me that cover is just a Place Holder, that looks awful.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Apr 12, 2013 12:00 pm Of course it's just a placeholder ;) Just as a reminder, the german covers of 1.01: 1.11 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Apr 12, 2013 12:14 pm Y'know what, Europe? Fuck you. Stop getting all of these early releases.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Apr 12, 2013 12:47 pm Wunderbar!

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 12:51 pm qu4d wrote: Of course it's just a placeholder ;) Just as a reminder, the german covers of

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Apr 12, 2013 1:04 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: To be honest, those covers don't exactly look amazing either (except for maybe 1.01). Maybe Germany would be doing itself a favor by keeping the current place holder and the primary cover.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Apr 12, 2013 1:12 pm Well, the community guy from Univerum Anime said, that they are very limited with the artworks because of licensing stuff... I think they are ok, but I also have the first press releases from Japan, so I have the best of both worlds

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 5:13 pm qu4d wrote: Well, the community guy from Univerum Anime said, that they are very limited with the artworks because of licensing stuff... I think they are ok, but I also have the first press releases from Japan, so I have the best of both worlds

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 5:31 pm Stan wrote: I personally think the simple flat color is fine for the show. I loved the bright orange 2.22 style and wish that 1.11 got the red cover instead of the random snap-shot of Eva 01s leg.... Im almost certain that the NA release will just have the cyan box like the Jap blu ray---we don't need the weird cover art

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 german release in october 2013             Quote Post by NotPhoenixBeatz » Sat Apr 13, 2013 7:42 am qu4d wrote: Same as before with 1.01/1.11 and 2.22, which got a german dub/release kinda fast, Evangelion 3.33 will probably be released in october 2013. Source: http://www.bluray-disc.de/blu-ray-filme/evangelion-333-you-can-not-redo-blu-ray-disc

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 13, 2013 1:50 am Official date confirmed now. November 29th.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Sep 13, 2013 10:03 am There goes my cash for another month. I'm sort of curious for what the dub team will do with it. I don't envy Hannes Maurer, and whatever Misato's new actress is called, a single bit.

[]:             Quote Post by Black Swordsman » Fri Sep 13, 2013 4:25 pm Hopefully the English dub will be early next year...I hope

[]:             Quote Post by fleeting » Fri Sep 13, 2013 5:28 pm Black Swordsman wrote: Hopefully the English dub will be early next year...I hope

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Oct 18, 2013 2:28 am

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Oct 18, 2013 8:26 am Once again I must criticize the artwork. I have nothing against Unit 08, but I really think that cover art that only depicts one thing about the movie and isn't even really the biggest part about it as awkward. If they had to put an Eva on the cover I would say Eva 13 would fit a better role, but I don't exactly see Unit 08 as a proper cover for it. Like Mari with FUNi's 2.22 release.
